questions.question: Name one person killed in the plane crash known as 'The Day the Music Died.'
questions.answer: Buddy Holly, Ritchie Valens, or J. P. 'Big Bopper' Richardson

questions.question: This 1961 Broadway-adapted film stars Natalie Wood.
